name: requestLogStats
code:
SELECT
      COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_REQUESTS,
      SUM(CASE WHEN RESPONSE_CODE BETWEEN 200 AND 299 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SUCCESS_COUNT,
      SUM(CASE WHEN RESPONSE_CODE >= 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ERROR_COUNT,
      SUM(CASE WHEN RESPONSE_CODE = 403 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FORBIDDEN_COUNT,
      SUM(CASE WHEN RESPONSE_CODE = 429 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS RATE_LIMIT_COUNT,
      SUM(TICKETS_COUNT) AS TOTAL_TICKETS_FETCHED,
      ROUND(AVG(DURACAO_MS)) AS AVG_DURATION_MS,
      MAX(DATA) AS LAST_REQUEST
    FROM REQUEST_LOG
